name: Kit: Medicine MadMedicine Woman
raw_text:
Medicine MadMedicine Woman 
Description: Though a skilled healer, the 
Medicine Man or Medicine Woman has re- 
sponsibilities beyond curing the sick and minis- 
tering to the wounded. He or she also serves as a 
counselor, teacher, and spiritual advisor, using 
gentle words and supernatural forces to pro- 
mote the people's well-being. 
Requirements: A Medicine Man must have a 
minimum Intelligence of 9 and be of good align- 
ment.
